gbl.dose_note: NOTE: 1ml = 1.66 grams of GHB. Dosages above 2ml may induce heavy sleep.
gbl.name: gbl

properties.dose: Oral Light: 0.3-0.9ml Common: 0.6-1.5ml Strong: 1.2-2ml Heavy: 2-3ml Dangerous: 5ml+ | NOTE: 1ml = 1.66g GHB. Tends to induce heavy sleep at 2ml and higher.
properties.effects: relaxation, mood lift, happiness, sociability, increased sex drive, lowered inhibitions, analgesia, dystaxia, drowsiness, sleep, amnesia
properties.summary: A pro-drug to GHB whose rapid absorption leads it to have a faster onset and shorter duration.
